diagrams.title: Vector Addition - Head-to-Tail Method
diagrams.description: Shows how two vectors are added by placing them consecutively
diagrams.purpose: Visualize vector addition geometrically - place tail of v at head of u, the diagonal gives sum

diagrams.title: Vector Space ℝ² and ℝ³
diagrams.description: 2D and 3D coordinate systems showing basis vectors
elements: X and Y axes for ℝ²
X, Y, Z axes for ℝ³
diagrams.purpose: Understand coordinate representation and basis vectors in different dimensions

diagrams.title: Linear Transformation as Matrix Operation
diagrams.description: Shows input vector transformed by matrix to output vector
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how matrices transform space - stretching, rotating, or projecting vectors

diagrams.title: Span Visualization in ℝ³
diagrams.description: Shows how span changes based on number and independence of vectors
diagrams.purpose: Understand concept of span and linear independence visually

diagrams.title: System of Equations as Matrix
diagrams.description: Augmented matrix representation of linear equations
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how solving equations translates to matrix operations
